1st.option.title: 1st: Is using old criteria for old achievements of Java Edition?
1st.option.description_1: You need achieve old criteria to complete achievements when this option turns on. It affect %s, %s, %s and %s.
1st.option.description_2: When you turn off this option, you can put cooked cod or cooked salmon to your inventory from campfire or smoking furnace to complete %s, need go to biomes added after Minecraft 1.12 to complete %s, can kill hostile mobs added after Minecraft 1.12 %s, cannot kill stray or wither skeleton from a long distance away to complete %s. When you turn on this option, you need do as actual requirements %s shows.
1st.option.warning: Warning: You must install the mod "%s" to make sure this option can affect %s, the download page of "%s" is here: %s
2nd.option.title: 2nd: What criteria do %s use?
2nd.option.description: You need burn a raw iron in normal furnace to complete %s when this option is %s, need burn a iron ore block in normal furnace to complete %s when this option is %s, need take the iron out of the furnace or blast furnace to complete %s when this option is %s.
advancements.java_edition.java.title: Achievements in old Java Edition
advancements.java_edition.mine_wood.desc: Attack a tree until a block of wood pops out
advancements.java_edition.build_work_ben: Craft a workbench with four blocks of planks
Use planks and sticks to make a pickaxe
Construct a furnace out of eight cobblestone blocks
advancements.java_edition.build_hoe.desc: Use planks and sticks to make a hoe
advancements.java_edition.on_a_rail.desc: Travel by minecart at least 1 km from where you started
advancements.java_edition.build_sword.de: Use planks and sticks to make a sword
advancements.java_edition.kill_cow.title: Cow Tipper
advancements.java_edition.fly_pig.title: When Pigs Fly
advancements.java_edition.fly_pig.descri: Fly a pig off a cliff
advancements.java_edition.snipe_skeleton: Kill a skeleton with an arrow from more than 50 meters
advancements.java_edition.diamonds.title: DIAMONDS!
advancements.java_edition.diamonds.descr: Acquire diamonds with your iron tools
advancements.java_edition.portal.descrip: Build a portal to the Nether
advancements.java_edition.the_end.title: The End?
advancements.java_edition.enchantments.d: Use a book, obsidian and diamonds to construct an enchantment table
advancements.java_edition.overkill.title: Overkill
advancements.java_edition.overkill.descr: Deal nine hearts of damage in a single hit
advancements.java_edition.bookcase.title: Librarian
advancements.java_edition.bookcase.descr: Build some bookshelves to improve your enchantment table
